title: Love Hearts Sweets | Original Retro Love heart Sweets | Valentines | Weddings | Sharing, Partying and Gifting for Any Occasion.
features: Mini rolls of Love Hearts – Fun, heart-shaped sweets with playful messages.
Fruity and fizzy flavours – A delicious combination of fruit flavours with a fizzy twist.
Perfect for sharing – Great for weddings, parties, or as thoughtful favours.
Nostalgic favourite – A retro sweet loved by generations for its fun and unique design.
Every Sweet Jar is securely sealed to ensure freshness when it arrives at your doorstep!
Our Sweet Jars come with Long Expiry Dates.
Packed in a facility that handles MILK, WHEAT, GLUTEN, SOYA, EGG, PEANUTS, TREE NUTS & SULPHITES.
description: Product Description Where Tradition Meets Quality Bentley & Ackerman is a story of excellence rooted in British heritage. From our humble beginnings, we have grown into one of the most trusted suppliers of premium confectionery in the UK. Our commitment to tradition, quality, and innovation ensures that every jar of sweets we create brings joy to all occasions. Bentley & Ackerman's iconic sweet jar collection is the ultimate gift, perfect for making every occasion more memorable. A Classic Gift for All Occasions Our beautifully designed sweet jars are perfect for gifting. Whether it’s a birthday, anniversary, or a simple gesture of appreciation, Bentley & Ackerman jars make every moment sweeter. Filled with a range of iconic British sweets, these jars deliver a timeless experience in every bite. Modern Craftsmanship, Timeless Flavours At Bentley & Ackerman, we marry modern production methods with traditional recipes to create sweets that are as authentic as they are delicious. Each sweet is crafted to deliver a taste of nostalgia while meeting the high standards of today’s discerning customers. A Sweet for Everyone With an extensive range of sweets, chocolates, and confectionery, Bentley & Ackerman offers something for everyone. From tangy bonbons to creamy fudge and crunchy brittle, our jars bring smiles to the faces of friends, family, and loved ones alike. Retro Charm, Modern Delight Our sweet jars are brimming with the finest retro treats, each carefully selected for quality and taste. Bentley & Ackerman confectionery promises a trip down memory lane, creating moments of happiness with every bite.
